questions.q: According to early trial results released in April 2026, nearly all responding patients given a personalized mRNA vaccine for which type of cancer are still alive six years later?
A severe pregnancy and delivery complication recently featured in breaking news involves maternal heart failure and a sudden feeling of impending doom. What is the medical term for this condition?
A recent Scientific American piece exploring the neurological basis of chronic pain asserts that the condition is constructed not just in the body, but essentially where else?
Which virus, known for causing severe vomiting and diarrhea particularly in babies and young children, is currently seeing unusually high levels in the U.S. according to the CDC?
In mid-April 2026, Congress grilled Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. primarily regarding his stance on which two issues?
options: Opioid regulations and mental health funding
Abortion access and FDA approval processes
